memoryArtifacts.headline: tree_Moores_Ancestry
memoryArtifacts.description: This document was compiled by Orville Sullivan L6L2-JJB who is a grandson of Carrie Moore and Delos Sullivan, I was given a paper copy and decided to scan it in and create the searchable text form of the document so others may see and use it. I  tagged a number of the people found in the document to make it easier for others to locate.

sourceList.title: Orville O Sullivan in household of Oscar C Sullivan, "United States Census, 1930"

zh.lifeSummary: 當Orville Oscar Sullivan於1929年12月17日出生在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特耐維斯號時，他的父親Oscar Cornelius Sullivan34歲，母親Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham22歲。他於1953年5月16日與Delores Marie Kurtz在美國華盛頓州可利吉塔特素姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1940年住在美國明尼蘇達州賀伯特耐維斯號 堂史普且於1959年住在美國華盛頓州斯卡馬尼亞。他去世於2006年8月2日在美國華盛頓州克拉克溫哥華享年76歲，埋葬在美國華盛頓州克拉克溫哥華。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Orville Oscar Sullivan于1929年12月17日出生在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特耐維斯號时，他的父亲Oscar Cornelius Sullivan34岁，母亲Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham22岁。他于1953年5月16日与Delores Marie Kurtz在美国华盛顿州可利吉塔特素姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1940年住在美国明尼苏达州賀伯特耐維斯號 堂史普且于1959年住在美国华盛顿州斯卡馬尼亞。他去世于2006年8月2日在美国华盛顿州克拉克溫哥華享年76岁，埋葬在美国华盛顿州克拉克溫哥華。

nameMeanings.name: Sullivan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Donal, James Patrick, Michael Patrick, Aileen, Brigid, Paddy, Siobhan, John Patrick, Kevin Patrick, Parnell.
Irish (Cork and Kerry): shortened form of   O'Sullivan  .

variants.name: O'Sullivan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Siobhan, Declan, Kieran, Cathal, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, Seamus.
Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Súileabháin ‘descendant of Súileabhán’, a personal name from súil ‘eye’ + dubh ‘dark’ + the diminutive suffix -án. Compare Sullivan .

nameMeanings.name: Orville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Though in appearance a surname of Norman baronial origin, this name was in fact invented (with the intention of evoking such associations) by the novelist  Fanny Burney  for the hero,  Lord Orville , of her novel Evelina (  1778 ).

nameMeanings.name: Oscar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old Irish name , which is borne in the Fenian sagas by a grandson of  Finn mac Cumhaill  (  Finn MacCool ). It was resuscitated by the antiquarian poet  James Macpherson  (  1736–96 ), author of the Ossian poems. It is now also a characteristically Scandinavian name; it was introduced to Sweden because  Napoleon , an admirer of the works of  Macpherson , imposed the name on his godson Oscar Bernadotte, who became  King Oscar I  of Sweden in  1844  (  see also  Malvina  ). In more recent times it has been associated particularly with the Irish writer and wit  Oscar Wilde  (  1854–1900 ), and with the annual awards for achievement in the film industry made by the American Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences. Oscar is one of a number of Celtic names that have recently come into general use and have become increasingly popular since the 1990s.

historicEvents.description: The Star-Spangled Banner is adopted as the national anthem.

Galloping Gertie is the reference used to describe the Tacoma Narrows Bridge. It opened on July 1, 1940 four months later it no longer existed. On November 7, 1940 the wind gusts came up to 40 miles an hour causing the bridge to twist and vibrate violently before it collapsed into Puget Sound. The only victim of the bridge collapsing was a three-legged paralyzed dog named Tubby whose owner tried to rescue him from the car but he wouldn’t go with him.
United States military forces play a leading role against North Korean and Chinese troops in Korean War.

historicEvents.title: Seattle Space Needle is Built
historicEvents.description: Construction on the Seattle Space Needle was constructed on April 17, 1961, and was opened on April 21, 1962. It was built for the World’s Fair in 1962. The space needle is an observation tower that is iconic to Seattle and a landmark of the Pacific Northwest. It was meant to only be lite for 75 nights per year or less to reduce light pollution. On September 11, 2001 the lights of the space were left on for 11 days straight.

historicEvents.title: The Twenty-Sixth Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Twenty-sixth Amendment prohibits the states and the federal government from using age as a reason for denying the right to vote to citizens who are eighteen years old or older.

historicEvents.title: Starbucks is Founded
historicEvents.description: On March 31, 1971, in Pike Place Market, in Seattle, Washington, Starbucks coffee company opened their first shop.

historicEvents.title: Kuwait Gulf War
historicEvents.description: The Gulf War also known as the First Gulf War, and commonly known as Desert Storm.  It was initiated with United Nations authorization, by a coalition force from 34 nations against Iraq, with the expressed purpose of expelling Iraqi forces from Kuwait after its invasion and annexation on 2 August 1990.

historicEvents.title: Spokane Washington Temple
historicEvents.description: Dedicated on August 21-23,1999 by President Gordon B. Hinckley the Spokane Washington Temple was the second built in Washington. The oxen for the font and angel Moroni were delivered by a trucker from Albuquerque, New Mexico.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Temples of the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints- Spokane Washington Temple

en.lifeSummary: When Orville Oscar Sullivan was born on 17 December 1929, in Nevis, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States, his father, Oscar Cornelius Sullivan, was 34 and his mother, Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham, was 22. He married Delores Marie Kurtz on 16 May 1953, in Husum, Klickitat, Washington, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He lived in Nevis Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, United States in 1940 and Skamania, Washington, United States in 1959. He died on 2 August 2006, in Vancouver, Clark, Washington, United States, at the age of 76, and was buried in Vancouver, Clark, Washington, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Orville Oscar Sullivan est né le 17 décembre 1929, à Nevis, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis, son père, Oscar Cornelius Sullivan, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Delores Marie Kurtz le 16 mai 1953, à Husum, Klickitat, Washington, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il a vécu à Nevis Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, États-Unis en 1940 et à Skamania, Washington, États-Unis en 1959. Il est décédé le 2 août 2006, à Vancouver, Clark, Washington, États-Unis, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Vancouver, Clark, Washington, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Orville Oscar Sullivan am 17. Dezember 1929 in Nevis, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Oscar Cornelius Sullivan 34 und seine Mutter Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham 22. Er hat am 16. Mai 1953 in Husum, Klickitat, Washington, Vereinigte Staaten Delores Marie Kurtz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1940 hat er in Nevis Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Vereinigte Staaten und 1959 in Skamania, Washington, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 2. August 2006 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Orville Oscar Sullivan è nato il il 17 dicembre 1929 nel Nevis, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Oscar Cornelius Sullivan, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Delores Marie Kurtz il 16 maggio 1953, nel Husum, Klickitat, Washington, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Vissuto a Nevis Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1940 e nel Skamania, Washington, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1959. Morì il 2 agosto 2006, nel Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Orville Oscar Sullivanが1929年12月17日にアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードネヴィスで生まれた時，父Oscar Cornelius Sullivanは34歳，母Gertrude Cecilia Cunninghamは22歳であった。1953年5月16日にアメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クリクイタトハスムでDelores Marie Kurtzと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1940年にはアメリカ合衆国ミネソタ州ハバードネヴィス トウンシュイップに，1959年にはアメリカ合衆国ワシントン州スカマニアに住んでいた。彼は2006年8月2日にアメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クラークヴァンコウバーで76歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ワシントン州クラークヴァンコウバーにて埋葬された。

ko.White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Uni: 미국 워싱턴 주 클릭이타트 휘트 살몬
ko.lifeSummary: Orville Oscar Sullivan(이)가 1929년 12월 17일 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 네비스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Oscar Cornelius Sullivan(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1953년 5월 16일 미국 워싱턴 주 클릭이타트 후수에서 Delores Marie Kurtz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1940년도에 미국 미네소타 주 후브바드 네비스 타운시프에서, 1959년도에 미국 워싱턴 주 스카먼이아에서 살았다. 그는 2006년 8월 2일 미국 워싱턴 주 클라르크 버코우버에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 워싱턴 주 클라르크 버코우버에 묻혔다.

pt.Carson, Skamania, Washington, United Sta: Carson, Skamania, Washington, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Orville Oscar Sullivan nasceu em 17 de dezembro de 1929, em Nevis, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Oscar Cornelius Sullivan, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Delores Marie Kurtz em 16 de maio de 1953, em Husum, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele viveu em Nevis Township, Hubbard, Minesota, Estados Unidos da América em 1940 e em Skamania, Washington, Estados Unidos da América em 1959. Ele faleceu em 2 de agosto de 2006, em Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Estados Unidos da América, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Badoura Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Un: бадоура тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты
ru.Nevis Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Unit: невис тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты
ru.White Salmon, Klickitat, Washington, Uni: уит салмон, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Orville Oscar Sullivan родился 17 декабря 1929 г. в местности невис, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Oscar Cornelius Sullivan было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Delores Marie Kurtz 16 мая 1953 г. в местности хусум, кликкитат, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он жил в местности невис тоуншип, хуббард, Миннесота, Соединенные штаты в 1940 году и в местности скаманя, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты в 1959 году. Он умер 2 августа 2006 г. в местности ванкоувир, кларк, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности ванкоувир, кларк, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Orville Oscar Sullivan nació el 17 de diciembre de 1929, en Nevis, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos, su papá, Oscar Cornelius Sullivan, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Gertrude Cecilia Cunningham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Delores Marie Kurtz el 16 de mayo de 1953, en Husum, Klickitat, Washington, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Vivió en Nevis Township, Hubbard, Minnesota, Estados Unidos en 1940 y en Skamania, Washington, Estados Unidos en 1959. Murió el 2 de agosto de 2006, en Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Vancouver, Clark, Washington, Estados Unidos.
